_comment: Pipeline operational health baselines and drift thresholds. ALL UNCALIBRATED. Calibrate after 14 days of real pipeline runs by reviewing actual metric values in pipeline logs. Tony reviews and updates.
_status: UNCALIBRATED — baselines are empty until calibrated after Day 14

baselines._note: Populate these after 14 days of real runs by averaging the daily values from run logs.

thresholds._note: Max fractional deviation from baseline before a WARN alert fires. 0.50 = 50% deviation. These are starting suggestions — adjust after observing real variance.

suppression._note: Drift alerts suppressed for first 14 days — no baseline to compare against.

metric_descriptions.email_count_24h: Total emails fetched in the 24-hour fetch window
metric_descriptions.draft_count: Number of drafts generated by draft_generator.py
metric_descriptions.crm_miss_rate: Fraction of CRM lookups returning not-found (0.0–1.0)
metric_descriptions.api_call_count: Total Claude API calls consumed by api_guard
metric_descriptions.pipeline_duration_s: Total pipeline wall-clock time in seconds
